inputs.price_source: 424B5 preliminary prospectus supplement — NYSE close June 29, 2026
inputs.shares_source: 150,321,586 shares outstanding March 31, 2026 (424B5 capitalization table; Q1 10-Q)
inputs.shares_pro_forma_note: $100M equity offering at ~$6.97 adds ~14.3M shares before convert dilution [Assumption]
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net loss $410.2M on 145M weighted shares; Q1 2026 operating loss $119M with minimal revenue — normalized owner cash negative during restart [Assumption]
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence ten-year FCF path not meaningful pre-refi; stance uses dated equity-stub scenarios per equity_stub_valuation.md.

capital_structure.post_transaction_cash_note: Mar 31 cash $52.2M plus ~$83M excess from sources/uses table [424B5]
capital_structure.syndication_risk: JPMorgan $675M Term Loan B reportedly faced weak demand late June 2026 [pending third party]

bear.notes: Refi fails or closes then production/regulatory shock; Exxon acceleration or distressed exchange; equity stub near zero

base.notes: Cross-conditioned Transactions close by July 24; ~45-50k bbl/d gross oil stabilizes; $975M debt service covered at mid-cycle oil; modest re-rating vs dilution

bull.notes: Full SYU ramp incl. Hondo + perforations; oil $75+; Term Loan B amortized from excess cash flow; converts remain out-of-the-money; equity re-rates toward asset NAV

bear.trigger: No Term Loan B syndication by July 24, 2026 OR post-close California pipeline/order shutdown

base.trigger: Transactions close on filed terms ($675M TL B + $300M converts + $100M equity)

bull.trigger: Full 77-well ramp + Hondo Q3 2026 + perforation program; oil $75 WTI

stance_proposal.override_reason: Levered stub: base case ~13% annual return but bear case is capital-structure wipeout; dhando partial only if refi closes

optionality_gate.notes: Floor uses stressed NAV on 30k bbl/d at $55 net less net debt; not dhando until Exxon loan refinanced

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Oil properties capitalized at cost; restart production not in FY2025 revenue ($0 hydrocarbon sales)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / perforation upside?
option_scan.evidence: Up to 41 perforation additions by 2029; 8 ESPs from 2028 (~$40.8M capex) per 424B5

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 net loss $410.2M; Q1 2026 operating loss $119M during restart (10-K, 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Regulatory / litigation binary?
option_scan.evidence: California PHMSA litigation, DPA order, federal vs state permitting (10-K Risk Factors)

option_scan.question: Capital markets catalyst dated?
option_scan.evidence: June 30, 2026 424B5: $100M equity + $300M converts + $675M Term Loan B to repay Exxon by July 24

option_scan.question: Warrant overhang?
option_scan.evidence: Warrant liabilities $121M fair value Dec 31, 2025 (10-K); SPAC legacy overhang

growth_explanation.mechanism: Payoff depends on Santa Ynez production ramp from 43k bbl/d (June 2026) toward full field capacity, not on Lawrence FCF growth.
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Term Loan B syndication fails before July 24, 2026 Exxon maturity.
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Platform Hondo online Q3 2026 plus perforation additions raise volumes above 55k bbl/d with mid-cycle oil.
